testimonials.title: Trusted by Researchers Worldwide
testimonials.text1: "The citations are all real and DOI-verifiable. This is exactly what I needed for my thesis."
testimonials.text2: "Saved me weeks of literature searching. The review was submission-ready with minimal edits."
testimonials.text3: "Finally an AI tool that generates real citations. No more fake papers to verify."
